outcome_contract.why: Staff-facing screens (bookings, management, auth, modals) use wrong foreground tokens on coloured backgrounds, redundant opacity syntax, and broken focus ring selectors. This makes buttons and badges harder to read and keyboard focus invisible on daily-use interfaces.
outcome_contract.intended_outcome_statement: All remaining reception components use correct semantic foreground tokens on status-coloured backgrounds, with valid focus ring syntax and no redundant opacity modifiers.

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: All 23+ issues are wrong/missing className tokens causing poor contrast or invisible states
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: All issues verified against actual file contents and reception tailwind.config.mjs
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: All className fixes must be verified against token definitions

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Double focus prefix makes focus rings invisible; confusing hover flip on CheckoutTable
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Focus ring syntax must be `focus-visible:ring-*` not `focus-visible:focus:ring-*`

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: No auth, data, or input changes

Multiple affected components have existing test files (VarianceHeatMap, StatusButton, OpeningFloatModal, ChipComponents, CheckoutTable, BookingRow, DocInsertButton) — check for className assertions that may need updating
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Tests may assert old className values
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Typecheck + lint + check existing tests for old className assertions

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: No type/schema/API changes — className strings only
className changes have zero runtime cost
Prior overhauls used single commit, revert = `git revert <sha>`

stage_payload.scope_summary: Batch fix of ~25 theming issues across ~19 component files in the reception app's bookings, management, auth, and till-modal areas. All fixes are className string replacements using existing semantic tokens. This continues the systematic theming overhaul that already fixed the bar/POS area (14 fixes, commit `b955bf38c4`) and till/safe area (9 fixes, commit `aea95ee6b0`). The inbox area was audited and found clean.
goals: Fix all double focus prefix issues (`focus-visible:focus:` → `focus-visible:`)
Fix wrong token base in BookingPaymentsLists
Fix confusing hover state flip in CheckoutTable
non_goals: Adding new tokens to the design system
Changing business logic in any component
Fixing issues in bar/POS (already done) or till/safe (already done) or inbox (clean)
constraints: All changes must use existing semantic tokens from `apps/reception/tailwind.config.mjs` — no new token definitions
Purely className adjustments — no component API changes
`error-fg` does NOT exist in reception config — must use `danger-fg` for error/danger foregrounds
key_entry_points: `apps/reception/src/components/checkins/` — check-in UI (StatusButton, EmailBookingButton, BookingRow, DocInsertButton, CityTaxPaymentButton)
